nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: UNIDENTIFIED VESSEL. CUT YOUR THRUST.
This is Galactic Patrol. Our radar operators recorded your vessel crossing this corridor significantly above the posted limit.
We have reasonable suspicion of a speed violation. This is a routine check. Hold your position.
Officer Kolb, badge four-one-one. Forty-one years on this corridor. I have heard every excuse a mouth can produce.
Four questions. Tell me the truth, or tell me you don't know. Make something up and I will find something to charge you with. I always do.

nodes.speaker: Tev - Translating
lines: okay okay okay okay.
Do NOT be weird. I need ninety seconds.
And listen — he's a truth guy. I know the type. Tell him the truth, or tell him you don't know. Either one.
Just do NOT make something up. And do NOT be funny.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: First question. Do you know how fast you were going?

responses.buttonText: Fast. Too fast. I'm not going to pretend otherwise.
No. Honestly, I wasn't watching the gauge.
I was under the limit the whole way.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Mm.
...I'm writing that down.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Question two. This vessel. Who does it belong to?

responses.buttonText: It's his. All his. I'm just the driver.
My associate's. He can't fly — that's what I'm for.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Registered to a Tev. Flight licence revoked four years ago.
...So you're the driver.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: The registry says this hull belongs to someone named Tev.
Mm. ...Writing that down.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: State your business on Fiery Twin.

responses.buttonText: Cargo run. I'm delivering something for my associate.
Honestly? He asked, I said yes, I didn't ask what for.
Tourism. We heard the sunrise is lethal and wanted to see it.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Family.
Son, the surface of Fiery Twin peels paint off a hull. Nobody has family there.
Mm.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: What is that sound?

responses.buttonText: Hull tick. She does that when she's cold.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: ...Panicking.
Huh. At least that's an honest answer.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Could be my end. This channel's been garbage all week.
Forget it.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: That's not a hull tick.
I've flown hulls for forty-one years. That is a voice.
Mm.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Stop.
You think you're funny. Every one of you thinks you're funny. Forty-one years, and not one of you has been.
That's your one. Try it again and I stop asking questions and start filling out forms.
Answer the rest of them straight.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Stop.
You think you're funny. Every one of you thinks you're funny. Forty-one years, and not one of you has been.
That's your one. Try it again and I stop asking questions and start filling out forms.
Answer the rest of them straight.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Stop.
You think you're funny. Every one of you thinks you're funny. Forty-one years, and not one of you has been.
That's your one. Try it again and I stop asking questions and start filling out forms.
Answer the rest of them straight.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Stop.
You think you're funny. Every one of you thinks you're funny. Forty-one years, and not one of you has been.
That's your one. Try it again and I stop asking questions and start filling out forms.
Answer the rest of them straight.

nodes.speaker: Galactic Patrol
lines: Hold position. Running your answers through central.
